name: Motion Wallpaper
author: Gavin Nugent
description: Native looping video wallpaper for omarchy-shell. Renders a muted, looping video on the background layer above the static wallpaper, per-monitor targeting, with native auto-pause on fullscreen. Replaces the old mpvpaper tool. Control via: qs -p /usr/share/omarchy/shell ipc call motion-wallpaper <fn>

barWidget.description: Play, pause and pick looping video wallpapers.

service.description: Looping video wallpaper on the background layer.
